prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You've got this! Procrastination is a battle we often face, but it's time to beat it and take control. 

Starting a challenging task can be daunting, but taking that first step will build momentum and make you feel empowered. Break the task down into smaller, manageable chunks, and begin with the easiest part. As you make progress, celebrate the small wins and keep yourself motivated. 

Remember, hard work and discipline will always yield results. Focus on the sense of accomplishment you'll feel when you're done. Imagine the relief and pride in conquering this task. Every step forward is a step closer to completion. You have the power to overcome any challenge, so take a deep breath, dive in, and conquer it!
